description: Do not use goto statements for control flow
suggested_fix: Replace goto statements with structured control flow constructs.

description: Use fixed width integer types such as uint32_t and int32_t
suggested_fix: Replace primitive integer types with stdint.h data types.

description: Avoid global variables unless absolutely necessary
suggested_fix: Move variables to local scope or encapsulate them within modules.

description: Dynamic memory allocation using malloc and free is prohibited
suggested_fix: Use static memory allocation and fixed-size buffers.

description: Functions shall not exceed fifty executable lines
suggested_fix: Split large functions into smaller reusable functions.

description: All variables shall be initialized before first use
suggested_fix: Initialize variables at declaration.

description: Variable names shall be meaningful and self descriptive
suggested_fix: Use descriptive names that indicate purpose.

description: Recursive functions shall not be used in embedded applications
suggested_fix: Replace recursion with iterative logic.

description: Use const qualifier for read only data whenever applicable
suggested_fix: Add const qualifier to immutable data.

description: Avoid hard coded numeric constants in source code
suggested_fix: Replace magic numbers with named constants or macros.

description: Every function shall include a descriptive header comment
suggested_fix: Add comments describing purpose, parameters and return values.

description: Loop nesting depth shall not exceed three levels
suggested_fix: Refactor nested loops into helper functions.

description: Return values from functions shall always be checked
suggested_fix: Validate return values and handle failures.

description: Deprecated or unsafe standard library functions shall not be used
suggested_fix: Replace deprecated APIs with safer alternatives.

description: Use standard typedef based data types across the project
suggested_fix: Use project typedefs or stdint.h types consistently.

description: Functions should have a single point of exit whenever practical
suggested_fix: Refactor functions to use a single return statement.

description: All conditional and loop statements shall use braces
suggested_fix: Add braces around all control structures.

description: Pointer variables shall be initialized to NULL before use
suggested_fix: Initialize pointers and validate before dereferencing.

description: Unused variables and dead code shall be removed
suggested_fix: Delete unused declarations and unreachable code.

description: Functions shall not accept more than five parameters
suggested_fix: Group parameters into structures.

description: All switch statements shall contain a default case
suggested_fix: Add a default branch to every switch statement.

description: Avoid deeply nested conditional statements
suggested_fix: Simplify logic using helper functions.

description: Use enums instead of numeric state values
suggested_fix: Define and use enumerations.

description: Header files shall contain include guards
suggested_fix: Add include guards or pragma once.

description: Avoid implicit type conversions
suggested_fix: Use explicit casts when necessary.

description: Avoid pointer arithmetic where possible
suggested_fix: Use array indexing or safer access methods.

description: All macros shall be enclosed in parentheses
suggested_fix: Wrap macro expressions with parentheses.

description: Do not redefine standard library symbols
suggested_fix: Use unique project-specific identifiers.

description: Limit source file size to five hundred lines
suggested_fix: Split large source files into modules.

description: Each source file shall have a corresponding header file
suggested_fix: Create matching header interfaces.

description: All interrupt service routines shall be kept short
suggested_fix: Move lengthy processing outside ISR context.

description: Shared resources shall be protected from concurrent access
suggested_fix: Use mutexes, semaphores or critical sections.

description: Volatile keyword shall be used for hardware register access
suggested_fix: Declare hardware mapped variables as volatile.

description: Avoid blocking delays inside critical application paths
suggested_fix: Use timers or event-driven mechanisms.

description: Check array bounds before accessing elements
suggested_fix: Validate indices before use.

description: Do not ignore compiler warnings
suggested_fix: Resolve all compiler warnings before release.

description: All configuration values shall be centralized
suggested_fix: Move configuration values to dedicated headers.

description: Avoid duplicate code blocks
suggested_fix: Extract common functionality into reusable functions.

description: All public APIs shall be documented
suggested_fix: Provide API documentation for exposed interfaces.

description: Error conditions shall be logged appropriately
suggested_fix: Add error logging and diagnostic information.

description: Do not cast away const qualifiers
suggested_fix: Preserve const correctness throughout the code.

description: Use static keyword for internal linkage functions
suggested_fix: Declare private functions as static.

description: Avoid multiple variable declarations in a single statement
suggested_fix: Declare one variable per statement.

description: Check pointer validity before dereferencing
suggested_fix: Validate pointers against NULL.

description: Avoid side effects in conditional expressions
suggested_fix: Separate assignments from conditions.

description: All hardware initialization shall be validated
suggested_fix: Check initialization status and return codes.

description: Use descriptive names for macros and constants
suggested_fix: Rename identifiers using clear naming conventions.

description: All files shall contain version and ownership information
suggested_fix: Add file header metadata.

description: Avoid using floating point operations in time critical code
suggested_fix: Use fixed-point arithmetic when possible.

description: Source code shall compile without errors and warnings
suggested_fix: Resolve all compilation issues before integration.
